notification.name: Incident Created
notification.description: Notifies library staff when student creates incident report

notification.name: Incident Confirmation
notification.description: Sends confirmation email to student after creating incident
notification.template_subject: Your Book Dispute Report #${record.number} - Academic Library

notification.name: Approval Requested
notification.description: Sends approval request to designated reviewer/manager

notification.name: Dispute Approved
notification.description: Notifies student that dispute has been approved
notification.template_subject: Good News! Your Book Dispute #${record.number} Has Been Approved
notification.template_body:
Dear Student,
Great news! Your book dispute claim has been approved.
Incident Number: ${record.number} Book: ${record.book_title}
What Happens Next: - You have two options: 1. Pay the fee of $${record.calculated_fee} to close this claim 2. Request a replacement book from the library
To Pay Online: Click here: [Payment Portal Link] Your payment will be processed securely.
To Request Replacement: Contact the library at library@acadresolve.edu with your incident number.
Important: Please complete your resolution within 14 days to finalize this case.
Need Help? - Status Page: [Link to incident tracking] - Contact: library@acadresolve.edu
Best regards, Academic Book Dispute Resolution System

notification.name: Dispute Rejected
notification.description: Notifies student that dispute claim has been rejected

notification.name: Payment Received
notification.description: Confirms payment received and case closed

notification.name: Replacement Completed
notification.description: Notifies student that replacement book is ready for pickup
notification.template_subject: Your Replacement Book is Ready - Incident #${record.number}
notification.template_body:
Dear Student,
Your replacement book is now ready for pickup!
Incident Number: ${record.number} Original Book: ${record.book_title} Replacement Available: [Book Title/Details]
Pickup Information: Location: Academic Library - Circulation Desk Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, Saturday 10am-4pm You must present your Student ID
Please pick up your book within 14 days.
Questions? Contact the library at library@acadresolve.edu or visit us in person.
Best regards, Academic Book Dispute Resolution System

email_inbound_rule.name: Process Email Dispute Submissions
email_inbound_rule.description: Automatically creates incidents from email submissions
